channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [APOLLOHOSP] Apollo Hospitals: NCLT Approves Meeting Date Changes
item.description:
Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Ltd received approval from the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) to modify the dates for convening meetings with various stakeholders. The meetings, originally scheduled for late May 2026, have been moved to late June 2026. The NCLT order, dated May 8, 2026, addresses applications related to changes in meeting dates for secured creditors, unsecured creditors, and equity shareholders. The tribunal upheld its previous order regarding quorum requirements.

  • NCLT approves Apollo Hospitals' application to change meeting dates.
  • Meeting dates for secured, unsecured creditors, and equity shareholders are rescheduled.
  • Original meeting dates in late May 2026 are moved to late June 2026.
  • Tribunal reaffirms its prior order on quorum requirements for all meetings.
  • Applications IA(COMPANIES.ACT)/120(CHE)2026, 129(CHE)2026, and 119(CHE)2026 are allowed and disposed of.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: APOLLO HOSPITALS ENTERPRISE LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [ROLEXRINGS] Rolex Rings Board Meeting on May 16, 2026
item.description:
Rolex Rings Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 16, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window closure period will end 48 hours after the results are made public.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 16, 2026, to approve audited financials.
  • Financial results are for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window closure ends 48 hours after results are public.
  • Information available on the company's website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rolex Rings Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BANKINDIA] Bank of India: 30th AGM to be held on 15-06-2026
item.description:
Bank of India announced its 30th Annual General Meeting (AGM) will be held on June 15, 2026, via video conferencing. The record date for dividend eligibility is May 29, 2026. The annual report will be dispatched to shareholders by email as of May 22, 2026.

  • Bank of India's 30th AGM is scheduled for June 15, 2026, via VC.
  • Record date for dividend eligibility is set for May 29, 2026.
  • Annual report dispatch to shareholders' emails by May 22, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BANK OF INDIA | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [SAH] Aeroflex Neu Re-appoints A. Modi & Co. as Internal Auditor
item.description:
Aeroflex Neu Ltd has re-appointed M/s. A. Modi & Co., Chartered Accountants, as the Internal Auditor of the company for the financial year 2026-27, pursuant to Section 138 of the Companies Act 2013. This decision was approved and recommended by the Audit Committee. The Board of Directors also approved the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, along with the auditor's report.

  • A. Modi & Co. re-appointed as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27.
  • Appointment follows Section 138 of Companies Act 2013.
  • Board approved audited financial results for FY 2025-26.
  • Auditor's report on financial statements had an unmodified opinion.
  • Board meeting held on May 08, 2026, from 03:30 p.m. to 04:30 p.m.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sah Polymers Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [KOTIC] Kothari Industrial Corp Equity Shares Available for Trading on MSE
item.description:
Kothari Industrial Corporation Ltd announced that its equity shares will be available for trading on the Metropolitan Stock Exchange of India Limited (MSE). However, the company has not entered into a listing agreement with MSE and will not be considered a listed entity on MSE. Consequently, no separate listing compliances or fees will apply with respect to MSE.

  • Kothari Industrial's equity shares to be available for trading on MSE.
  • Company not considered a listed entity on MSE due to no listing agreement.
  • No separate listing compliances or fees applicable with respect to MSE.
  • Information submitted for the Exchange and shareholders.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KOTHARI INDUSTRIAL CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [OMEGAIN] Omega Interactive Tech FY26: Revenue ₹7,098.75 Lakh
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Omega Interactive Technologies Ltd approved the audited standalone financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The results show a revenue from operations of ₹7,098.75 Lakh and a profit before tax of ₹309.99 Lakh. The Board of Directors approved these results at their meeting on May 8, 2026.

  • Omega Interactive's revenue from operations reached ₹7,098.75 Lakh for FY26.
  • The company reported a profit before tax of ₹309.99 Lakh for the same period.
  • The Board of Directors approved the audited standalone financial results on May 8, 2026.
  • Basic earnings per share stood at 0.28% and diluted earnings per share at 0.01%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OMEGA INTERACTIVE TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [CARRARO] Carraro India Gets Relief from ₹6.37 Cr Tax Demand
item.description:
Carraro India Limited received a favorable order from the Commissioner of Customs, Pune, resulting in the dropping of a tax demand related to short levy of IGST @ 10%. Consequently, the company obtained complete relief from a tax demand of ₹6,37,26,310. This will reduce the contingent liability of the company by the same amount.

  • Carraro India received a favorable order from Customs, Pune.
  • Tax demand of ₹6,37,26,310 due to short levy of IGST dropped.
  • Company obtains complete relief from the tax demand.
  • Contingent liability of Carraro India reduced by ₹6.37 Cr.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Carraro India Ltd | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [SHUBHAM] Shubham Polyspin Board Meeting on May 14, 2026
item.description:
Shubham Polyspin Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 14, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for the company's shares will remain closed from April 1, 2026, to May 16, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 14, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Financial results are for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, to May 16, 2026.
  • Closure is until 48 hours after the declaration of financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shubham Polyspin Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [GSLSEC] GSL Securities Approves Audited FY26 Financial Results
item.description:
GSL Securities Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results and statements for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, along with the auditor's report. The audit committee reviewed and recommended the results, which the board then approved at a meeting held on May 8, 2026. The board also approved the re-appointment of Mr. Akshaya Poddar as Internal Auditor and Mr. Shiv Hari Jalan as Secretarial Auditor for FY 2026-27. The meeting commenced at 4:00 PM and concluded at 5:30 PM.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved with unmodified auditor's opinion.
  • Akshaya Poddar re-appointed as Internal Auditor for FY27.
  • Shiv Hari Jalan re-appointed as Secretarial Auditor for FY27.
  • Certificate of utilization of funds raised through preferential issue approved.
  • Financial results available on company and BSE/CSE websites.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GSL SECURITIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SWIGGY] Swiggy: Monitoring Agency Report for Quarter Ended March 2026
item.description:
Swiggy Ltd submitted a Monitoring Agency Report by CRISIL Ratings Limited for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as per SEBI regulations. The report, reviewed by the Audit Committee and approved by the Board on May 08, 2026, covers the utilization of IPO and QIP proceeds. The report indicates no deviations from the intended objects of the issue, based on information provided by Swiggy and sources believed to be reliable. Crisil Ratings confirms no conflict of interest in monitoring the utilization of issue proceeds.

  • Swiggy submits Monitoring Agency Report by CRISIL for Q1 2026.
  • Report confirms no deviation from IPO/QIP proceeds utilization.
  • Audit Committee reviewed and Board approved the report on May 8, 2026.
  • CRISIL Ratings states no conflict of interest in monitoring proceeds.
  • Report is available on Swiggy's corporate website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Swiggy Ltd | Category: Regulatory
